chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 223 of 2024 (Muhammad Fayaz v. The Director FIA and 04 others) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case ------------------------------ 23.04.2024 Syed Samiullah Shah, advocate for the applicant ------------------------------------------- The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application are that by making an application under Section 22-A/B Cr.PC, the applicant has sought for direction against the official respondents to register proper FIR based on inquiry. It was disposed of by learned IVth- Additional Sessions Judge/ Ex-officio Justice of Peace Karachi East vide order dated 17.8.2023 by concluding that no direction for registration of FIR can be given excepting for decision of inquiry against the applicant within one month; such order is impugned by the applicant before this court by preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application with a prayer that same to be set aside with acquittal of the applicant. No acquittal of any person could be recorded by this Court straight away without the case being registered against him. Even otherwise, no illegality is pointed in impugned order which may justify this Court to interfere with the same by way of Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed in limine. J U D G E
